features.name: Multi-format import
features.implementationTarget: Import pipeline for PDF, JPEG/PNG, MusicXML/XML/MXL, TXT, DOCX-to-PDF conversion, audio, MIDI, and video references.
acceptanceCriteria: Supported file types are validated and ingested into the local asset store.
Imported items appear in the library with correct type metadata.

features.name: Bulk ingest
features.implementationTarget: Folder import, multi-select picker, and watched-folder ingest jobs.
acceptanceCriteria: A folder import creates one library item per supported file.
Duplicate detection prevents accidental double-ingest.

features.name: Scanner pipeline
features.implementationTarget: Scan ingest with crop, deskew, grayscale cleanup, contrast boost, ordering, and PDF assembly.
acceptanceCriteria: A multi-page scan can be assembled into a single score PDF.
Crop and deskew settings can be previewed before save.

features.name: Cloud connectors
features.implementationTarget: OneDrive, Dropbox, Google Drive, SMB, and local-network import connectors.
acceptanceCriteria: Authorized cloud sources can import supported documents.
Offline reconnection resumes interrupted imports.

features.name: Publisher and source intake
features.implementationTarget: Secure partner-link imports and institution-managed repositories.
acceptanceCriteria: Authenticated repository links can create verified import jobs.

features.name: Public-domain browsing
features.implementationTarget: Optional public-domain catalog browsing.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can browse and import from configured catalog sources.

features.name: Hierarchical library and metadata
features.implementationTarget: Collections, tags, composers, genres, instruments, ensembles, seasons, difficulty, and custom fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Scores can be organized by collections and tags.
Custom metadata fields persist through backup and restore.

features.name: Setlists and rehearsal programs
features.implementationTarget: Ordered setlists, folders, smart collections, recents, and favorites.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can create, reorder, and persist setlists.
Recent and favorite items update automatically.

features.name: Bookmarks and excerpts
features.implementationTarget: Page and range bookmarks with excerpt-style behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Bookmarks open directly to the target page or range.

features.name: Version groups
features.implementationTarget: Multiple editions or edits grouped under one work identity.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can switch between versions without losing annotations.

features.name: Fast global search
features.implementationTarget: Search across titles, composers, tags, notes, metadata, and extracted text.
acceptanceCriteria: Global search returns relevant items from indexed metadata and text.

features.name: Reading and display modes
features.implementationTarget: Single-page, continuous, two-page landscape, split-screen, and external-display modes.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can switch modes without losing current page context.

features.name: Half-page turns
features.implementationTarget: Per-score or per-page half-page split line and page-turn behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Half-page navigation works via touch and foot pedal.

features.name: Performance mode
features.implementationTarget: Reduced chrome and accidental-touch suppression.
acceptanceCriteria: Non-essential controls are hidden and accidental taps are minimized.

features.name: Viewer transforms and display effects
features.implementationTarget: Zoom, pan, crop, margin trim, rotation, sepia, and inverted night mode.
acceptanceCriteria: Transform settings persist per score when configured.

features.name: Basic annotation tools
features.implementationTarget: Pen, highlighter, eraser, lasso, text box, shape, stamp, freehand, measure rectangle, and color presets.
acceptanceCriteria: Annotations are stored separately from the source document.
Stylus input is persisted and restored with page anchoring.

features.name: Annotation layers
features.implementationTarget: Layer create, duplicate, hide/show, copy, paste, lock, export, and privacy controls.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can show or hide layers without deleting annotations.

features.name: Jumps and navigation shortcuts
features.implementationTarget: Bookmarks, jumps, codas, DS/DC, hyperlinks, and custom tap targets.
acceptanceCriteria: Jump targets navigate predictably and persist across backup/restore.

features.name: PDF page editing
features.implementationTarget: Rearrange, duplicate, reorder, split, merge, rotate, crop, and delete PDF pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Page edits create a new document revision without losing annotation bindings.

features.name: Excerpt and content copy workflows
features.implementationTarget: Page content copy/paste and excerpt creation.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can create excerpts linked to the original work.

features.name: Media associations
features.implementationTarget: Associate audio tracks, MIDI files, metronome settings, and video references with scores or bookmarks.
acceptanceCriteria: Media links persist through backup and restore.

features.name: Media synchronization
features.implementationTarget: Sync media playback to markers and page turns.
acceptanceCriteria: Playback markers remain aligned after project reload.

features.name: Rehearsal utilities
features.implementationTarget: Tempo, loop, playback speed, pitch shift, rehearsal markers, metronome, tuner, and count-in.
acceptanceCriteria: Metronome and rehearsal markers can be stored per score.

features.name: Bluetooth pedal support
features.implementationTarget: Customizable pedal mappings with debounce logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Pedal actions can be remapped and do not trigger duplicate turns during debounce.

features.name: Projects and permissions
features.implementationTarget: Shared projects, invite links, roles, and access controls.
acceptanceCriteria: Project membership and roles determine edit permissions.

features.name: Shared and private layers
features.implementationTarget: Private and shared annotation-layer ownership.
acceptanceCriteria: Private notes are not overwritten or exposed during sync.

features.name: Version history and audit logs
features.implementationTarget: Conflict detection, merge preview, revision history, and audit logs.
acceptanceCriteria: Conflicting edits produce a merge or preservation workflow instead of silent overwrite.

features.name: Offline-first synchronization
features.implementationTarget: Queue score, metadata, annotation, bookmark, media, and project changes for sync.
acceptanceCriteria: Offline edits are queued and synchronized after reconnection.

features.name: Encrypted backup archive
features.implementationTarget: Single-file encrypted archive for documents, annotations, metadata, setlists, settings, and project references.
acceptanceCriteria: Backup files contain a manifest and all referenced artifacts.
A fresh restore reproduces a working library.

features.name: Selective restore and recovery
features.implementationTarget: Selective restore, full restore, autosave snapshots, deleted-item recovery, and schema migration wizard.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can restore a single score or a full archive.

features.name: Windows-native deployment
features.implementationTarget: MSIX packaging, EXE bootstrapper fallback, desktop and Start menu entries, update rings, diagnostics export, and first-run setup.
acceptanceCriteria: The signed installer creates the expected application entry points on Windows 11.
